hub_corp.title: Corporate Domain
hub_corp.text: Compromised user identities and ransomware behavior are reported. Every machine has a specific role; inspect real business files too.

corp_hr.title: HR Workstation
corp_hr.text: Role: HR payroll and onboarding tools workstation. Legitimate CV/PDF files must be reviewed; no network scanning tools are installed here.

options.label: Review HR documents and startup entries
options.effectText: Found macro lure in a legitimate applicant file and linked user compromise.

options.label: Force endpoint shutdown
options.effectText: Host powered off abruptly; evidence collection became harder.

corp_dc.title: Domain Controller
corp_dc.text: Role: identity authority. Multiple compromised users authenticated from unusual geos.

options.label: Inspect user logons and Kerberos abuse indicators
options.effectText: Mapped compromised users and C2 beacons from domain auth telemetry.

options.label: Disable routing service in domain firewall
options.effectText: Domain segment routing collapsed after firewall service block.

corp_fs.title: Finance File Server
corp_fs.text: Role: payroll + contracts storage. Ransomware started changing files and scheduling deletion jobs.

options.label: Stop delete jobs and preserve shared files
options.effectText: Deletion chain interrupted; legitimate finance files are protected.

options.label: Ignore and move on
options.effectText: Ransomware kept deleting files while you were away.
